bugs_found: GET /api/manager/conversations returns list but test expects get-or-create single conversation with messages
store/index.ts plan_proposed handler passes raw payload as Plan — plan_data field not mapped from nested plan.steps
ManagerChat.tsx useEffect([messages, plans]) calls upsertPlan which modifies plans, causing infinite render loop
_do_commit and _do_open_pr call subprocess.run directly in async context, blocking the event loop
_sign_off_on_step reads decision.get('notes') but prompt returns key 'note' (singular), so sign-off notes are always empty
plan_cancelled and plan_started WS events not handled in dispatchWSEvent, so plan status never updates in UI
bugs_fixed: GET /api/manager/conversations now returns get-or-create conversation + messages alongside conversations list
store/index.ts plan_proposed handler now maps payload.plan.steps to PlanStep[] and sets plan_data correctly
ManagerChat.tsx useEffect now uses a seededPlanIds ref to prevent infinite loop — plans removed from deps
_do_commit and _do_open_pr all subprocess.run calls offloaded to _SESSION_EXECUTOR via run_in_executor
_sign_off_on_step now reads decision.get('note') first before falling back to 'notes' and 'reason'
dispatchWSEvent now handles plan_cancelled (marks status cancelled) and plan_started (marks status in_progress)
